data.title: Bitcoin’s Path Unclear As Subwave Chaos Meets Key Resistance At $113,000
data.description:
Bitcoin’s price action is caught in uncertainty as messy subwave structures clash with a critical resistance at $113,000. While the market shows attempts at recovery, the unclear wave patterns leave traders divided on whether the next move will be a breakout or a deeper correction. Messy Subwaves Keep Bitcoin’s Next Move Clouded TARA, a crypto analyst, recently shared fresh insights on X regarding Bitcoin’s ongoing price action. According to the analyst, Bitcoin is currently in the middle of forming another wave down, but the subwave structure is still messy and unclear
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoins-path-unclear/

data.title: Cardano’s roadmap reveals $50 million liquidity push for stablecoins, DeFi and RWA
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin Price Rises as Gold Pulls Back — Is BTC About to Take the Lead?
data.description:
The recent surge in Bitcoin prices has caught the attention of investors as gold experiences a pullback in its value. This shift has led many to wonder if Bitcoin, the pioneering cryptocurrency, is poised to take the lead in the financial markets, capitalizing on the opportunity presented by gold's decline. As traditional safe-haven assets face challenges, will Bitcoin emerge as the preferred choice for those seeking stability and growth?

data.title: San Francisco Fed President Supports Recent Rate Cut, Signals Possible Future Adjustments
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, San Francisco Federal Reserve President Mary Daly expressed her full support for the Federal Reserve's recent decision to cut interest rates. She indicated that further rate reductions might be necessary in the future. Daly highlighted that economic growth, consumer spending, and the labor market have all slowed, while inflation has risen less than expected, primarily affecting industries directly impacted by tariffs.

Daly noted that economic risks have shifted, necessitating action. Looking ahead, she suggested that policy adjustments might be required to stabilize prices while providing essential support to the labor market. However, she emphasized that the Federal Reserve's forecasts are not commitments, with the primary goal remaining maximum employment and price stability. Previously, Daly had stated that two 25 basis point rate cuts this year were a reasonable prediction, but she did not update this view on Wednesday.

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried’s ‘gm’ Sparks FTT Rally as FTX Prepares $1.6B Repayment
data.description:
Sam Bankman-Fried's casual greeting of 'gm' has ignited a significant rally in the price of FTT, the native token of the FTX exchange, as the company gears up to make a substantial repayment of $1.6 billion to its creditors. This unexpected uptick in FTT's value reflects renewed investor interest and optimism surrounding the future of FTX, particularly in light of its ongoing efforts to settle outstanding debts and stabilize its operations following recent financial challenges.
source: https://blocknews.com/sam-bankman-frieds-gm-sparks-ftt-rally-as-ftx-prepares-1-6b-repayment/

data.description:
